Home / Services / Concrete Demolition

Concrete Demolition

Safe and efficient concrete demolition and removal services.

Need to remove old, damaged, or unwanted concrete? Total Concrete Services, INC provides safe and efficient concrete demolition and removal services throughout Bakersfield. We have the equipment and expertise to handle any size project, from small residential demolition to large commercial tear-outs. Our team carefully assesses the site, implements safety protocols, and uses specialized equipment to break up and remove the concrete. We then haul away the debris and dispose of it responsibly. Whether you're removing an old driveway in Oleander-Sunset or demolishing a concrete structure in Seven Oaks, we can provide a cost-effective and reliable solution. We are committed to providing exceptional service and minimizing disruption to your property. Let us handle the dirty work so you can focus on your next project.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site Assessment & Safety Planning
  2. 02 Step 2: Concrete Demolition
  3. 03 Step 3: Debris Removal
  4. 04 Step 4: Site Cleanup

Benefits

  • Safe and efficient demolition
  • Responsible debris disposal
  • Minimal disruption to your property
  • Cost-effective solutions

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a permit for concrete demolition?

In some cases, a permit may be required for concrete demolition. We can help you determine if a permit is needed and assist with the application process.

How much does concrete demolition cost?

The cost of concrete demolition depends on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free estimates and will provide a detailed breakdown of all costs involved.

How long does concrete demolition take?

The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with concrete demolition? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +16618094179
